text:
The glass walls and empty chairs in the first image invite contemplation about boundaries—transparent, fragile barriers that reveal yet separate. There is a quiet tension, as if the stillness is waiting to be broken by thought or dialogue. 

Contrastingly, the vibrant, immersive wall of the second image envelops me in color and concept, igniting curiosity. The text and displays provoke philosophical reflection on the relationship between humans, technology, and knowledge creation. I feel inquisitive and alert, as though I inhabit a threshold where research and meaning converge in an ongoing act of creation.
